text.title: OKR Setting Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of OKR Setting.

example.scenario: Solo founder sets 2 objectives (activate / monetise); 3 KRs each (signups, activation %, retention-d7; trials, paid conv %, MRR); weekly Tuesday 09:30 check-in; mid-quarter pivot on activation KR after low confidence.
